reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No substantive comments or reviews have been posted yet. The thread remains in the RFC stage, waiting for feedback from reviewers.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new function, add_private_memory_driver_managed(), which allows drivers to hotplug memory as N_MEMORY_PRIVATE. The function combines node_private_region_register() and __add_memory_driver_managed() to ensure proper ordering of operations.
